sourcesContent:
export const PROJECTS = [
  {
    id: 'skillsift',
    cat: 'ai',
    badge: 'AI / RAG',
    badgeClass: 'badge-ai',
    num: '01 — AI',
    title: 'SkillSift — AI Resume Screening',
    problem: "Manual resume filtering is slow and misses qualified candidates who don't use exact keywords.",
    solution: 'RAG pipeline that ingests PDFs, converts to structured Markdown, and uses BM25 retrieval ranking to match candidates from natural language job queries.',
    tags: [
      { label: 'Python', cls: '' }, { label: 'RAG', cls: '' },
      { label: 'BM25', cls: '' }, { label: 'FastAPI', cls: '' },
      { label: 'LLM', cls: 'green' },
    ],
    github: 'https://github.com/sharmela-s',
    githubPlaceholder: true,
  },
  {
    id: 'finance',
    cat: 'ai',
    badge: 'AI / Agents',
    badgeClass: 'badge-ai',
    num: '02 — AI',
    title: 'Finance Assistant — Multi-Agent AI',
    problem: 'Financial analysis needs multi-step reasoning across spending and investments — too complex for a single LLM call.',
    solution: 'Modular multi-agent system using Google ADK and Gemini APIs. Each agent handles a specialised subtask with LLM-based reasoning orchestrating the full pipeline in real time.',
    tags: [
      { label: 'Python', cls: '' }, { label: 'Google ADK', cls: '' },
      { label: 'Gemini API', cls: '' }, { label: 'Multi-Agent', cls: 'green' },
    ],
    github: 'https://github.com/Sharmela-S/Finance-Assistant-AI-Agent',
    githubPlaceholder: true,
  },
  {
    id: 'pathpilot',
    cat: 'ai',
    badge: 'AI / LLM',
    badgeClass: 'badge-ai',
    num: '03 — AI',
    title: 'PathPilot — AI Career Guidance',
    problem: 'Career guidance is generic. Non-traditional background candidates need personalised, actionable roadmaps.',
    solution: 'LLM-powered platform that analyses user skills to generate structured career roadmaps with automated PDF report generation from a single natural language query.',
    tags: [
      { label: 'Python', cls: '' }, { label: 'FastAPI', cls: '' },
      { label: 'LLM', cls: '' }, { label: 'PDF Generation', cls: 'green' },
    ],
    github: 'https://github.com/sharmela-s',
    githubPlaceholder: true,
  },
  {
    id: 'instantserve',
    cat: 'backend',
    badge: 'Backend',
    badgeClass: 'badge-backend',
    num: '04 — BACKEND',
    title: 'Instant Serve — Booking API',
    problem: 'Service booking platforms need secure multi-role flows for customers, providers, and admins.',
    solution: 'Role-based backend using FastAPI and MongoDB with JWT authentication and RBAC. Connects users with nearby service providers through tamper-resistant booking workflows.',
    tags: [
      { label: 'Python', cls: '' }, { label: 'FastAPI', cls: '' },
      { label: 'MongoDB', cls: '' }, { label: 'JWT', cls: 'green' }, { label: 'RBAC', cls: 'green' },
    ],
    github: 'https://github.com/sharmela-s',
    githubPlaceholder: true,
  },
  {
    id: 'navinest',
    cat: 'backend',
    badge: 'Backend',
    badgeClass: 'badge-backend',
    num: '05 — BACKEND',
    title: 'Navi Nest — E-Commerce Backend',
    problem: 'Vehicle spare parts marketplace needed secure payment APIs, order tracking, and media management.',
    solution: 'Node.js/Express REST API backed by MongoDB with Cloudinary for media storage and Razorpay payment gateway integration. React frontend consumes the API.',
    tags: [
      { label: 'Node.js', cls: '' }, { label: 'Express', cls: '' },
      { label: 'MongoDB', cls: '' }, { label: 'Razorpay', cls: 'green' }, { label: 'Cloudinary', cls: 'green' },
    ],
    github: 'https://github.com/sharmela-s',
    githubPlaceholder: true,
  },
  {
    id: 'dinediscover',
    cat: 'frontend',
    badge: 'Frontend',
    badgeClass: 'badge-frontend',
    num: '06 — FRONTEND',
    title: 'Dine and Discover — Restaurant Finder',
    problem: 'Finding local restaurants needed a clean, location-aware interface with detailed venue info.',
    solution: 'Location-based platform to search and explore restaurants with user-friendly interface, detailed descriptions, and fully responsive layout using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.',
    tags: [
      { label: 'HTML5', cls: 'orange' }, { label: 'CSS3', cls: 'orange' },
      { label: 'JavaScript', cls: 'orange' }, { label: 'Responsive', cls: 'orange' },
    ],
    github: 'https://github.com/sharmela-s',
    githubPlaceholder: true,
  },
];

export const SKILLS = [
  {
    title: 'AI / ML',
    label: 'Primary Expertise',
    dim: false,
    items: [
      'Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)',
      'Large Language Models (LLMs)',
      'Agentic AI / Multi-Agent Systems',
      'Google ADK & Gemini API',
      'BM25 Ranking & Vector Retrieval',
    ],
  },
  {
    title: 'Backend',
    label: 'Core Stack',
    dim: false,
    items: [
      'FastAPI & Node.js / Express',
      'RESTful API Design',
      'JWT Authentication & RBAC',
      'MongoDB & MySQL',
      'Python (primary language)',
    ],
  },
  {
    title: 'Frontend',
    label: 'Supporting Knowledge',
    dim: true,
    items: [
      'React.js & JavaScript (ES6+)',
      'HTML5 & CSS3',
      'Responsive Web Design',
      'REST API Integration',
    ],
  },
];
